tasks.title: Install blog dependencies
tasks.description: Install required npm packages: @aureuma/svelta for blog functionality and marked for markdown rendering
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test that verifies @aureuma/svelta is installed in package.json dependencies
TDD: Write test that verifies marked is installed in package.json dependencies
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Create content directory structure
tasks.description: Create src/content/blog/ directory for markdown post files with sample posts
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test that verifies src/content/blog/ directory exists
TDD: Write test that verifies sample markdown files with frontmatter exist
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Create blog utility module
tasks.description: FR-1: Create src/lib/blog.ts with blog initialization using createRawBlog, including rawModules loading, getAuthor function, mapFrontmatter, and renderMarkdown configuration
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for blog module exports (getAllPosts, getPostBySlug, getCategories, getAllTags, pickHero, getAdjacentPosts)
TDD: Test fails when blog module is missing
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement frontmatter parsing
tasks.description: FR-1: Implement mapFrontmatter function to extract title, date, category, author, cover, excerpt, tags, featured, and draft from markdown frontmatter
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for mapFrontmatter with valid frontmatter data
TDD: Test fails when frontmatter fields are missing or invalid
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement author lookup
tasks.description: FR-5: Implement getAuthor function with author definitions and fallback to default author
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for getAuthor with valid author id
TDD: Test fails when author id is not found (should return default)
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement blog listing page server load
tasks.description: FR-2: Create src/routes/blog/+page.server.ts with load function that fetches all posts, hero, categories, and tags
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for load function returning posts, hero, categories, and tags
TDD: Test fails when load function returns incorrect data structure
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement blog listing page component
tasks.description: FR-2: Create src/routes/blog/+page.svelte with bento-grid layout, hero section, category filtering, and varied card sizes
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for blog listing page rendering with posts data
TDD: Test fails when category filter doesn't update displayed posts
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement individual post page server load
tasks.description: FR-3: Create src/routes/blog/[slug]/+page.server.ts with load function that fetches post by slug and adjacent posts, throws 404 for missing posts
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for load function returning post, previous, and next
TDD: Test fails with 404 error when slug doesn't exist
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement individual post page component
tasks.description: FR-3: Create src/routes/blog/[slug]/+page.svelte with article header, cover image, rendered markdown content, and previous/next navigation
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for post page rendering with post data
TDD: Test fails when markdown content is not rendered to HTML
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement reading time calculation
tasks.description: FR-6: Ensure reading time is calculated based on word count (200 words/minute) and displayed in short and long formats
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for reading time calculation with various word counts
TDD: Test fails when reading time doesn't round up correctly
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Test empty blog state
tasks.description: EC-1: Test listing page displays empty state message when no posts exist
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for empty posts array rendering empty state
TDD: Test fails when empty state message is not displayed
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Test invalid frontmatter handling
tasks.description: EC-2: Test that posts with missing or malformed frontmatter use default values and don't crash
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for post with missing required frontmatter fields
TDD: Test fails when invalid frontmatter causes crash instead of defaults
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Test missing cover image fallback
tasks.description: EC-3: Test that posts without cover images display gradient background cards
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for post card rendering without cover image
TDD: Test fails when missing image causes broken image icon
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Test 404 for invalid slug
tasks.description: EC-4: Test that navigating to non-existent post slug returns 404 error page
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for load function throwing 404 error on invalid slug
TDD: Test fails when invalid slug doesn't throw error
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Test draft post exclusion
tasks.description: EC-5: Test that posts with draft: true are excluded from production listing
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for draft posts being filtered out
TDD: Test fails when draft posts appear in published listing
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Apply consistent dark theme styling
tasks.description: Ensure blog pages use the existing te9 website dark theme with zinc colors, proper contrast, and consistent spacing
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test verifying Tailwind classes match design system
TDD: Test fails when colors don't match dark theme palette
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement responsive bento grid
tasks.description: Ensure bento grid layout is responsive with proper breakpoints for mobile, tablet, and desktop
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for grid layout at different viewport sizes
TDD: Test fails when cards don't stack properly on mobile
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Add typography plugin for prose
tasks.description: Install and configure @tailwindcss/typography plugin for styled markdown content rendering
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for prose classes rendering markdown with proper typography
TDD: Test fails when markdown content lacks proper styling
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Add blog navigation link to main layout
tasks.description: Add Journal/Blog link to the main site navigation in src/routes/+layout.svelte
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for blog link presence in navigation
TDD: Test fails when blog link is missing or incorrect href
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Verify existing routes unaffected
tasks.description: Test that existing routes (/, /garden) continue to function correctly after blog integration
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for home page loading correctly
TDD: Test fails when existing routes break after blog integration
TDD: Refactor after test passes

rules: Write test first (RED) - test must fail
Write minimal code to pass (GREEN) - no optimization
Refactor after test passes (REFACTOR) - maintain quality
All tasks must follow TDD cycle as acceptance criteria
